news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.

news.title:
GRSE, Cochin Shipyard & Mazagon Dock shares gain up to 18% in 2 days.
Despite broader market sell-off amid Middle East tensions, GRSE climbed 9%.
news.summary:
GRSE, Cochin Shipyard & Mazagon Dock shares gain up to 18% in 2 days.
Despite broader market sell-off amid Middle East tensions, GRSE climbed 9%.

news.title: Garden Reach Shipbuilders signed an MoU with Bharat Forge's subsidiary for defense and maritime innovation.
news.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders signed an MoU with Bharat Forge's subsidiary for defense and maritime innovation.

news.title:
GRSE signed MoU with KSSL to develop indigenous naval systems, enhancing maritime defence technologies.
GRSE shares rose 4.1% to ₹2407.55 on BSE as collaboration aims to boost self-reliance in defence tech.
news.summary:
GRSE signed MoU with KSSL to develop indigenous naval systems, enhancing maritime defence technologies.
GRSE shares rose 4.1% to ₹2407.55 on BSE as collaboration aims to boost self-reliance in defence tech.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders partners with Kalyani Strategic Systems for advanced naval systems.
Collaboration targets defense manufacturing for local and international markets.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders partners with Kalyani Strategic Systems for advanced naval systems.
Collaboration targets defense manufacturing for local and international markets.

news.title:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.
news.summary:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.

news.title: Elara Capital upgrades GRSE from Sell to Reduce, raising target to ₹2,300 from ₹2,030.
news.summary: Elara Capital upgrades GRSE from Sell to Reduce, raising target to ₹2,300 from ₹2,030.

news.title:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.
India may need 200-400 aircraft in 7-15 years; HAL, GRSE, Mazagon Dock to benefit.
news.summary:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.
India may need 200-400 aircraft in 7-15 years; HAL, GRSE, Mazagon Dock to benefit.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders' Q3 FY26 revenue rose 49% YoY to ₹1,896 cr; PAT grew 74% YoY to ₹171 cr.
Order book stands at ₹18,482 cr; expansions planned in West Bengal and Gujarat with ongoing deliveries.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders' Q3 FY26 revenue rose 49% YoY to ₹1,896 cr; PAT grew 74% YoY to ₹171 cr.
Order book stands at ₹18,482 cr; expansions planned in West Bengal and Gujarat with ongoing deliveries.

news.title:
GRSE begins building 2 coastal research vessels for GSI, equipped for geological mapping and mineral exploration.
GRSE is also constructing ocean research and acoustic ships, warships for Indian Navy, and vessels for Germany and Bengal.
news.summary:
GRSE begins building 2 coastal research vessels for GSI, equipped for geological mapping and mineral exploration.
GRSE is also constructing ocean research and acoustic ships, warships for Indian Navy, and vessels for Germany and Bengal.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders forms consortium with Hindustan Shipyard for National Shipbuilding Initiative.
The initiative aims to boost India's maritime capabilities and independence.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders forms consortium with Hindustan Shipyard for National Shipbuilding Initiative.
The initiative aims to boost India's maritime capabilities and independence.

news.title:
GRSE and HSL signed an MoU for SCI tender, aiming at strategic shipbuilding.
Focus on indigenous maritime infrastructure and tech self-reliance for Atmanirbharta.
news.summary:
GRSE and HSL signed an MoU for SCI tender, aiming at strategic shipbuilding.
Focus on indigenous maritime infrastructure and tech self-reliance for Atmanirbharta.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders secures ₹33 Cr contract for refitting Seychelles Coast Guard ship PS Zoroaster.
Refitting work is expected to be completed within three months.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders secures ₹33 Cr contract for refitting Seychelles Coast Guard ship PS Zoroaster.
Refitting work is expected to be completed within three months.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd schedules an Analysts & Brokers meet on 11th Feb 2026.
The meet will discuss Q3 & 9MFY26 financial performance at BSE Convention Hall, Mumbai.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd schedules an Analysts & Brokers meet on 11th Feb 2026.
The meet will discuss Q3 & 9MFY26 financial performance at BSE Convention Hall, Mumbai.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers (GRSE) has shown a strong EPS growth of 46% annually over the past three years, with EBIT margins improving from 5.7% to 9.4%.
Insiders hold ₹3.5 billion worth of GRSE stock, signaling alignment with shareholders, while its CEO compensation of ₹7.8 million appears modest.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers (GRSE) has shown a strong EPS growth of 46% annually over the past three years, with EBIT margins improving from 5.7% to 9.4%.
Insiders hold ₹3.5 billion worth of GRSE stock, signaling alignment with shareholders, while its CEO compensation of ₹7.8 million appears modest.

news.title:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd rose 7.1% on 30 Jan, closing at 2,765.7.
The surge is attributed to strong financial performance, investor confidence, and sector dynamics.
news.summary:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd rose 7.1% on 30 Jan, closing at 2,765.7.
The surge is attributed to strong financial performance, investor confidence, and sector dynamics.

news.title:
India's nuclear submarine program highlights indigenous efforts involving firms like Mishra Dhatu Nigam, PTC Industries, and CFF Fluid Control.
Stocks such as GRSE, Kirloskar Brothers, and Lloyds Engineering are in focus due to their naval-linked contributions, despite mixed stock performance.
news.summary:
India's nuclear submarine program highlights indigenous efforts involving firms like Mishra Dhatu Nigam, PTC Industries, and CFF Fluid Control.
Stocks such as GRSE, Kirloskar Brothers, and Lloyds Engineering are in focus due to their naval-linked contributions, despite mixed stock performance.

news.title:
Elara Capital maintains a Sell rating on Garden Reach Shipbuilders.
The target price has been reduced to 2,030.
news.summary:
Elara Capital maintains a Sell rating on Garden Reach Shipbuilders.
The target price has been reduced to 2,030.

news.title:
GRSE signed an MoU with K2 Cranes to manufacture marine and defence cranes.
The partnership boosts Atmanirbharta, reduces imports, and supports diversification beyond shipbuilding.
news.summary:
GRSE signed an MoU with K2 Cranes to manufacture marine and defence cranes.
The partnership boosts Atmanirbharta, reduces imports, and supports diversification beyond shipbuilding.

news.title:
GRSE's Q3 profit surged 73.9% YoY to ₹170.7 cr, driven by strong order execution. Revenue rose 49% to ₹1,895 cr, with margins at 9%.
Board declared a ₹7.15 interim dividend/share. Shares closed at ₹2,510, up 5.1%. GRSE benefits from Make in India defence initiatives.
news.summary:
GRSE's Q3 profit surged 73.9% YoY to ₹170.7 cr, driven by strong order execution. Revenue rose 49% to ₹1,895 cr, with margins at 9%.
Board declared a ₹7.15 interim dividend/share. Shares closed at ₹2,510, up 5.1%. GRSE benefits from Make in India defence initiatives.
